'''noyawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:euctical|euctical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euctical|euctical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| noyawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:noyawithi|noyawithi]] || [[word:noyawiji|noyawiji]] || [[word:noyawishi|noyawishi]] || [[word:noyawiki|noyawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:noyawuthuthu|noyawuthuthu]] || [[word:noyawujuju|noyawujuju]] || [[word:noyawushushu|noyawushushu]] || [[word:noyawukuku|noyawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:noyawuthu|noyawuthu]] || [[word:noyawuju|noyawuju]] || [[word:noyawushu|noyawushu]] || [[word:noyawuku|noyawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:noyawufthuf|noyawufthuf]] || [[word:noyawufjuf|noyawufjuf]] || [[word:noyawufshuf|noyawufshuf]] || [[word:noyawufkuf|noyawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:noyawethe|noyawethe]] || [[word:noyaweje|noyaweje]] || [[word:noyaweshe|noyaweshe]] || [[word:noyaweke|noyaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:noyawothotho|noyawothotho]] || [[word:noyawojojo|noyawojojo]] || [[word:noyawoshosho|noyawoshosho]] || [[word:noyawokoko|noyawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:noyawotho|noyawotho]] || [[word:noyawojo|noyawojo]] || [[word:noyawosho|noyawosho]] || [[word:noyawoko|noyawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:noyawofthof|noyawofthof]] || [[word:noyawofjof|noyawofjof]] || [[word:noyawofshof|noyawofshof]] || [[word:noyawofkof|noyawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfthÃŸf|noyawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfjÃŸf|noyawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfshÃŸf|noyawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfkÃŸf|noyawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|noyawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|noyawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|noyawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|noyawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfthÃŸf|noyawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfjÃŸf|noyawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfshÃŸf|noyawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfkÃŸf|noyawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfthÃŸf|noyawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfjÃŸf|noyawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfshÃŸf|noyawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noyawÃŸfkÃŸf|noyawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:noyawÃḊthÃḊ|noyawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:noyawÃḊjÃḊ|noyawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:noyawÃḊshÃḊ|noyawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:noyawÃḊkÃḊ|noyawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:noyawathatha|noyawathatha]] || [[word:noyawajaja|noyawajaja]] || [[word:noyawashasha|noyawashasha]] || [[word:noyawakaka|noyawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:noyawatha|noyawatha]] || [[word:noyawaja|noyawaja]] || [[word:noyawasha|noyawasha]] || [[word:noyawaka|noyawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:noyawafthaf|noyawafthaf]] || [[word:noyawafjaf|noyawafjaf]] || [[word:noyawafshaf|noyawafshaf]] || [[word:noyawafkaf|noyawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:noyawasha|noyawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:noyawshÃḋsha|noyawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noyawrosha|noyawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noyawmusha|noyawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:noyawyasha|noyawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoyawnkshÃḋsha|gonoyawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoyawnkrosha|gonoyawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoyawnkmusha|gonoyawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoyawnkyasha|gonoyawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:noyayawasha|noyayawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noyayawshÃḋsha|noyayawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noyayawrosha|noyayawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noyayawmusha|noyayawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noyayawyasha|noyayawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoyayawnkshÃḋsha|gonoyayawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoyayawnkrosha|gonoyayawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoyayawnkmusha|gonoyayawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoyayawnkyasha|gonoyayawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:neyÃḊwasha|neyÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:neyÃḊwshÃḋsha|neyÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:neyÃḊwrosha|neyÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:neyÃḊwmusha|neyÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:neyÃḊwyasha|neyÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goneyÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|goneyÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goneyÃḊwnkrosha|goneyÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goneyÃḊwnkmusha|goneyÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goneyÃḊwnkyasha|goneyÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:noyfawasha|noyfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noyfawshÃḋsha|noyfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noyfawrosha|noyfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noyfawmusha|noyfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noyfawyasha|noyfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoyfawnkshÃḋsha|gonoyfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoyfawnkrosha|gonoyfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoyfawnkmusha|gonoyfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoyfawnkyasha|gonoyfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
